title: John Gill's Exposition of the Entire Bible
author: John Gill
tradition_notes: Gill was the pastor of Southwark Baptist Church (London) for over 50 years and a leading Calvinistic Baptist theologian. His commentary is notable for extensive engagement with Rabbinic and Patristic sources. Often called hyper-Calvinist in soteriology, though this is debated.
notes: Gill died 1771 -- text is public domain in all jurisdictions. HelloAO marks this PDM 1.0. Original publication 1748-1763 (OT), 1746-1748 (NT). Coverage: 66 books (full Bible).
